chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI PRESENT: Mr. Justice Aqeel Ahmed Abbasi, CJ Mr. Justice Abdul Mobeen Lakho, J C.P. No.D-165 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE: For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 19th January 2024 Mr. Maqbool-ur-Rehman aloangwith Mr. Ishaque Ahmed Khawaja, Advocate for Petitioner alongwith Petitioner. Mr. Saifullah, Asst. Advocate-General, Sindh. Mr. Abdullah Hanjrah, Deputy Director (Law), Provincial Election Commission of Pakistan. Mr. Muhammad Haseeb Jamali alongwith Mr. Muzammil Hussain Jalbani, Advocate for Respondent No.4. Mr. Irshad Ali, Asst. Attorney General. -*-*-*-*-*- We have heard the learned counsel for the parties and perused the record of this case. For reasons to be recorded later on, instant Constitutional Petition is allowed and the impugned order dated 10.01.2024 passed by the Election Appellate Tribunal in Election Appeal No.167 of 2024 is hereby set aside. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
